query:
INSERT INTO siteSettings (key, value) VALUES ('aboutContent', 'James C. Bell is a pastor, author, and ministry leader whose work spans local church leadership, global pastoral training, and public theological writing. He serves as Lead Pastor of First Baptist Church of Fenton in Fenton, Michigan, where he has shepherded the congregation since 2016. He is the husband of Susanna and the father of five sons.

James is the founder of the Pastors Connection Network (PCN), a national and international ministry dedicated to connecting, mentoring, and equipping pastors and churches for sustainable, faithful ministry. PCN operates from the conviction that pastoral isolation is one of the most underaddressed crises in the church today.

James is the founder of LiveWell, a writing and ministry platform committed to biblical depth, cultural clarity, and prophetic honesty. Through LiveWell, he produces long-form theological and cultural writing for followers of Jesus who want more than surface-level faith.

He is the host of Following the Way, a podcast exploring what it means to follow Jesus faithfully in the world we actually live in.

At his core, James Bell is a pastor. Not a platform. Not a brand. A pastor.') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = VALUES(value)
